scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/assets && npm run build:css && npm run build:bridge && cp src/audio/nativeAudioIn.worklet.js dist/assets/native-audio-in.worklet.js && tish build --target js src/main.tish -o dist/main && cp index.html dist/index.html
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/assets && npm run build:css && npm run build:bridge && cp src/audio/nativeAudioIn.worklet.js dist/assets/native-audio-in.worklet.js && tish run --feature full dev-server.tish
